blueprint.label: Prioritizing bot automall
blueprint.description:
Maybe try x10'ing all requests? to help prevent assembler downtime.

Need to tune number of roboports to minimize them while still not getting charging congestion

Need to add solar power.

Need an "in progress" circuit line to help prevent overbuilding.

Probably needs a reset button because it keeps deadlocking.

entities.name: constant-combinator
entities.player_description: How many of each item to keep in stock
